body:
## ما الذي يفعله هذا الـ PR / What this PR does

يعيد تأطير Dealix كـ **شركة نظام تشغيل أعمال بالذكاء الاصطناعي (Saudi AI Business Operating System)** مبنية على **14 نظام تشغيل**، مع **Command Sprint** كأول وتد تجاري. يضيف العمود الفقري الكامل لتوثيق الإطلاق + سقالة التسليم.

Reframes Dealix as a **Saudi AI Business Operating System company** built on **14 Operating Systems**, with the **Command Sprint** as the first commercial wedge. Adds the complete launch documentation spine plus delivery scaffolding. **Docs-only — no code paths touched.**

## ما الذي أُضيف / What's added (39 launch docs + scaffolding)

| المجلد / Folder | المحتوى / Contents |
|---|---|
| `docs/00_platform_truth/` (5) | Source of Truth · Business OS Architecture · Product Family Map · honest Module Status Map · daily Launch Control Tower |
| `docs/01_go_to_market/` (6) | Command Sprint Offer · Market Intelligence OS (GTM) · Targeting Scorecard · Sales Playbook · Price Authority · Partner Strategy |
| `docs/02_operating_systems/` (14) | the 14 OS specs (Command → Academy), each with a status label + cross-links |
| `docs/03_governance/` (6) | Human Approval Policy · Claims Register · No-Spam · Data Retention · PDPL Readiness · External Actions |
| `docs/04_delivery/` (4) | 7-day Sprint runbook · Customer Folder template · Proof Pack template · Acceptance Criteria |
| `docs/05_founder/` (4) | Daily Command · Weekly Board Review · CEO Scorecard · Launch Go/No-Go |
| `customers/_TEMPLATE/` (12) | the canonical delivery folder seed (`00_intake.md … 11_upsell_recommendation.md`) |
| `data/targeting/`, `reports/launch/` | working-data + reporting seeds (data path stays gitignored; only READMEs tracked) |
| `README.md` + `README.ar.md` | new bilingual *Business OS Launch System* section |

## القواعد الصارمة / Hard rules enforced throughout

No auto-send · no mass WhatsApp · no scraping behind login · no fake proof · no guaranteed revenue claims · no client name published without approval · no customer data used for model training · no external action without founder approval · every target needs evidence · every paid customer needs a delivery folder + proof pack.

## الحالة الصادقة / Honest status

- **Module Status Map** و **Launch Control Tower** يقولان الحقيقة: Command Sprint هو الوتد القابل للبيع الآن؛ معظم أنظمة التوسّع `FUTURE`/`DOCS_ONLY`؛ الحوكمة والإثبات والبيانات أقرب للحياة.
- **Public-launch: No-Go** until ≥3 paid Sprints + 3 Proof Packs + 1 case study + 0 trust incidents.

## التحقق / Verification

- `make env-check` → ✅ Environment contract OK
- `scripts/security_smoke.py` → لا يوجد أي تنبيه في الملفات الجديدة (التنبيهات الموجودة كلها في fixtures/docs سابقة) / no findings in any new file
- `python -c "import api.main"` → يفشل فقط لأن تبعيات Python (fastapi) غير مثبّتة في الحاوية الجديدة، لا علاقة له بهذا التغيير / fails only because deps aren't installed in this fresh container — unrelated to this docs change

> هذه أهداف تشغيلية وليست ضمانًا للنتائج. / These are operational targets, not guarantees.

https://claude.ai/code/session_01JkyJLdHinFFEXvh9WbRA3F

---
_Generated by [Claude Code](https://claude.ai/code/session_01JkyJLdHinFFEXvh9WbRA3F)_

commits.messageBody:
Frame Dealix as a Saudi AI Business Operating System company (14 OS),
with the Command Sprint as the first commercial wedge. Adds the full
launch documentation spine plus delivery scaffolding:

- docs/00_platform_truth: source of truth, architecture, product family
  map, honest module status map, daily launch control tower
- docs/01_go_to_market: Command Sprint offer, market intelligence,
  targeting scorecard, sales playbook, price authority, partner strategy
- docs/02_operating_systems: 14 OS specs (Command -> Academy) with
  status labels and cross-links
- docs/03_governance: approval policy, claims register, no-spam,
  data retention, PDPL readiness, external actions policy
- docs/04_delivery: 7-day Sprint runbook, customer folder template,
  proof pack template, acceptance criteria
- docs/05_founder: daily command, weekly board review, CEO scorecard,
  launch go/no-go gate
- customers/_TEMPLATE: 12-file delivery folder seed
- data/targeting, reports/launch: working-data and reporting seeds
- README.md + README.ar.md: Business OS Launch System section

Hard rules enforced throughout: no auto-send, no mass WhatsApp, no
scraping behind login, no fake proof, no guaranteed revenue claims,
no client name published without approval, no customer data used for
model training, no external action without founder approval, evidence
per target, delivery folder + proof pack per paid customer.

Public-launch status: No-Go until >=3 paid Sprints + 3 Proof Packs +
1 case study + 0 trust incidents.
commits.messageHeadline: launch: build Dealix AI Business OS launch system

title: launch: Dealix AI Business OS launch system (14 OS + Command Sprint wedge)
